title: Quality Gate
description: Reusable quality bar validation rule from Layer 0 QUALITY_BARS.md. Defines automated checks for one of the 8 quality bars with validation logic, error detection, and remediation guidance.

bar_name.description: Which of the 8 quality bars this gate validates (from Layer 0 QUALITY_BARS.md)

bar_definition.description: Full definition from Layer 0 QUALITY_BARS.md for reference

what_it_means.description: Human-readable definition of what this bar checks

layer_0_ref.description: Reference to section in Layer 0 QUALITY_BARS.md

validation_checks.description: Automated validation checks for this bar. Each check is evaluated; bar passes if all checks pass.

check_id.description: Unique identifier for this check within the bar

method.description:
Validation method:
- python_expression: Execute Python code against state
- jsonpath_query: Query state with JSONPath
- regex_pattern: Match content against regex
- graph_traversal: Analyze topology graph
- llm_eval: Use LLM for subjective checks (Style, Presentation)
- tool_call: Invoke validation tool
- custom_function: Call named function from validator registry

expression.description: Validation expression (Python, JSONPath, regex, etc.) depending on method

target.description: What to validate (state key, artifact field, file path)

pass_condition.description: When does this check pass? (e.g., 'result == true', 'errors.length == 0')

severity.description:
Severity level:
- critical: Check failure = red bar
- warning: Check failure = yellow bar
- info: Check failure = note only

failure_message.description: Human-readable message when check fails (can include {{template}} variables)

status_thresholds.description: How check results map to bar status (green/yellow/red)

critical_failures.description: Max critical failures allowed for green

warning_failures.description: Max warning failures allowed for green

yellow.description: Conditions for yellow status (acceptable with remediation)

critical_failures.description: Max critical failures allowed for yellow (typically 0)

remediation.description: Guidance for fixing failures (from Layer 0 QUALITY_BARS.md 'Common failures & fixes')

smallest_viable_fix_template.description: Template for generating 'smallest viable fix' from check failure details

owner_assignment.description: Which role should fix which types of failures

additionalProperties.description: Role abbreviation -> check_ids that role should fix

blocking_policy.description: When does this bar block progression (from Layer 0 gatecheck rules)

blocks_on_red.description: Does red status block merge to Cold?

blocks_on_yellow.description: Does yellow status block merge? (typically false, yellow = conditional pass)

can_defer.description: Can this bar be deferred with explicit waiver? (rare, requires SR approval)

applicable_to.description: Which artifacts/contexts this bar applies to

artifact_types.description: Layer 3 schema names this bar validates (e.g., ['hook_card', 'canon_pack', 'codex_entry'])

loops.description: Loop IDs where this bar is checked

hot_cold.description: Does this bar apply to Hot, Cold, or both SoTs? (Most bars apply at Cold merge)

fully_automated.description: Can this bar be fully automated (no human review)? True for Integrity, Reachability. False for Style.

requires_llm.description: Does this bar require LLM evaluation? (True for Style, Presentation subjective checks)

requires_human.description: Does this bar always require human review? (True for some Accessibility checks)

evaluation_timeout.description: Max seconds to spend evaluating this bar (prevents hanging)

version.description: Version of this quality gate definition

test_cases.description: Test cases for validating this quality gate implementation

bar_definition.what_it_means: No dead references, valid IDs, no accidental dead ends

validator.expression: all(ref in artifact_ids for hook in hooks for ref in hook.locations_links.related_hooks)

common_failures.fix: Create the referenced section or retarget the choice

bar_definition.what_it_means: Prose voice, register, motifs align with Style Lead guardrails

validator.expression: Compare prose voice against style_addenda guidelines

parameters.llm_prompt: Evaluate if this prose maintains consistent voice with the style guide. Return 'pass' or 'fail' with explanation.
